# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

static_resources:
  listeners:
    - name: listener_http_80
      address:
        socket_address:
          address: 0.0.0.0
          port_value: 80
      per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes: 32768
      filter_chains:
        - filters:
            - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
              typed_config:
                "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
                stat_prefix: ingress_http
                codec_type: AUTO
                use_remote_address: true
                xff_num_trusted_hops: 1
                generate_request_id: true
                access_log:
                  - name: envoy.access_loggers.stdout
                    typed_config:
                      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.access_loggers.stream.v3.StdoutAccessLog
                common_http_protocol_options:
                  idle_timeout: 60s
                  headers_with_underscores_action: REJECT_REQUEST
                http2_protocol_options: {}
                stream_idle_timeout: 300s
                request_timeout: 30s
                route_config:
                  name: api_gateway_routes
                  virtual_hosts:
                    - name: api_gateway
                      domains:
                        - "*"
                      routes:
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/api/v1/"
                          route:
                            cluster: api_v1_service
                            timeout: 30s
                            retry_policy:
                              retry_on: "5xx,connect-failure,refused-stream,reset,unavailable,cancelled,retriable-status-codes"
                              num_retries: 2
                              per_try_timeout: 5s
                              retriable_status_codes:
                                - 503
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/api/v2/"
                          route:
                            cluster: api_v2_service
                            timeout: 30s
                            retry_policy:
                              retry_on: "5xx,connect-failure,refused-stream,reset,unavailable,cancelled,retriable-status-codes"
                              num_retries: 2
                              per_try_timeout: 5s
                              retriable_status_codes:
                                - 503
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/"
                          route:
                            cluster: default_service
                            timeout: 30s
                            retry_policy:
                              retry_on: "5xx,connect-failure,refused-stream,reset,unavailable,cancelled,retriable-status-codes"
                              num_retries: 1
                              per_try_timeout: 5s
                              retriable_status_codes:
                                - 503
                http_filters:
                  - name: envoy.filters.http.router
                    typed_config:
                      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router

  clusters:
    - name: api_v1_service
      type: STRICT_DNS
      connect_timeout: 2s
      dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
      lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
      respect_dns_ttl: true
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: api_v1_service
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address:
                      address: api-v1
                      port_value: 8080
      common_lb_config:
        healthy_panic_threshold:
          value: 0.0
      circuit_breakers:
        thresholds:
          - priority: DEFAULT
            max_connections: 1024
            max_pending_requests: 1024
            max_requests: 8192
            max_retries: 3
      upstream_connection_options:
        tcp_keepalive:
          keepalive_time: 300
          keepalive_interval: 30
          keepalive_probes: 3
      typed_extension_protocol_options:
        envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions
          common_http_protocol_options:
            idle_timeout: 60s
          explicit_http_config:
            http_protocol_options: {}
      health_checks:
        - timeout: 2s
          interval: 5s
          unhealthy_threshold: 3
          healthy_threshold: 2
          http_health_check:
            path: "/health"
            expected_statuses:
              - start: 200
                end: 299

    - name: api_v2_service
      type: STRICT_DNS
      connect_timeout: 2s
      dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
      lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
      respect_dns_ttl: true
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: api_v2_service
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address:
                      address: api-v2
                      port_value: 8080
      common_lb_config:
        healthy_panic_threshold:
          value: 0.0
      circuit_breakers:
        thresholds:
          - priority: DEFAULT
            max_connections: 1024
            max_pending_requests: 1024
            max_requests: 8192
            max_retries: 3
      upstream_connection_options:
        tcp_keepalive:
          keepalive_time: 300
          keepalive_interval: 30
          keepalive_probes: 3
      typed_extension_protocol_options:
        envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions
          common_http_protocol_options:
            idle_timeout: 60s
          explicit_http_config:
            http_protocol_options: {}
      health_checks:
        - timeout: 2s
          interval: 5s
          unhealthy_threshold: 3
          healthy_threshold: 2
          http_health_check:
            path: "/health"
            expected_statuses:
              - start: 200
                end: 299

    - name: default_service
      type: STRICT_DNS
      connect_timeout: 2s
      dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
      lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
      respect_dns_ttl: true
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: default_service
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address:
                      address: default-backend
                      port_value: 8080
      common_lb_config:
        healthy_panic_threshold:
          value: 0.0
      circuit_breakers:
        thresholds:
          - priority: DEFAULT
            max_connections: 512
            max_pending_requests: 512
            max_requests: 4096
            max_retries: 2
      upstream_connection_options:
        tcp_keepalive:
          keepalive_time: 300
          keepalive_interval: 30
          keepalive_probes: 3
      typed_extension_protocol_options:
        envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions
          common_http_protocol_options:
            idle_timeout: 60s
          explicit_http_config:
            http_protocol_options: {}
      health_checks:
        - timeout: 2s
          interval: 10s
          unhealthy_threshold: 3
          healthy_threshold: 2
          http_health_check:
            path: "/health"
            expected_statuses:
              - start: 200
                end: 299

admin:
  access_log_path: /tmp/admin_access.log
  address:
    socket_address:
      address: 0.0.0.0
      port_value: 9901
